title: Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 5|more=Shape}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures05-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 5:
The Shape-Shifter Strikes'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[February]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 5|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 5]], which was released in [[February]] [[2003]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=82 |isbn=0439458846 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]{{CSWECite|I|151|Cradossk}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series to a year before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 4: Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters|Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra|Warlords of Balmorra]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes''''' was the fifth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 5|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 5]] in [[February]] [[2003]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Darth Tyranus has placed a bounty on the head of Hurlo Holowan, the diabolical droid engineer.'' ''But Holowan has fled to her fortified estate on Kuat''. ''Getting into her headquarters is going to be difficult. Getting out is going to be tougher. Only a shapeshifter could hope to enter. Only a bounty hunter named Zam Wesell could hope to exit…alive.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures05-Book.jpg|Novel cover File:Adventures05-GameBook.jpg|Game
